title: Register for a free trial with valid details
description: A prospective customer can submit the trial registration form successfully and see confirmation after entering valid information.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the navigation bar trial call to action
Fill in the required name field with a valid full name
Fill in the required business field with a valid store name
Fill in the required email field with a valid email address
Fill in the required phone field with a valid phone number
Fill in the required address field with a valid address
Submit the trial registration form
Verify a success confirmation is visible
Verify the trial form is no longer ready for submission

title: Jump from the hero to the trial form
description: A prospective store owner can use the hero call to action to reach the trial registration form and start signup.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the primary trial call to action
Verify the trial registration form is displayed

title: Navigate from hero to trial registration and submit a valid request
description: A prospective customer can move from the homepage hero to the trial form and submit a valid free-trial request, resulting in a success confirmation.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the hero call to action for starting a free trial
Fill in the name field with a valid full name
Fill in the email field with a valid email address
Fill in the company field with a valid company name
Fill in the phone field with a valid phone number
Fill in the address field with a valid address
Submit the trial registration form
Verify a success confirmation is visible
Verify the trial registration form is no longer prompting for required details

title: Submit a valid free trial request
description: A prospective customer can complete the trial form with valid business details and see a success confirmation after submission.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to the trial registration section
Fill in the store name field with Sequndang Mart
Fill in the owner name field with Budi Santoso
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the WhatsApp number field with a valid phone number
Select a business type
Fill in the city or regency field with Bandung
Select a customer package
Submit the trial registration form
Verify a success confirmation is visible
Verify the trial request is shown as submitted

title: Jump from the navbar to the trial form
description: A visitor can use the navigation bar trial call to action to reach the registration form without losing their place on the page.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the navigation bar trial call to action
Verify the trial registration form is displayed

title: Use the navbar to jump to key sections
description: A visitor can use the sticky navigation bar to jump to major sections and keep browsing the one-page site efficiently.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll down the page
Click the navigation link for the features section
Verify the features section is displayed

title: Show required-field validation on empty trial form
description: Submitting the trial form without required details shows validation messages and prevents completion.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to the trial registration section
Submit the trial registration form
Verify validation errors are visible for the required fields
Verify a success confirmation is not visible

title: Start trial registration from a pricing plan CTA
description: A visitor can click a pricing plan call to action and reach the trial registration form to continue sign-up.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to the pricing section
Click a pricing plan call to action for starting a trial
Verify the trial registration section is displayed
Verify the trial registration form is visible

title: Compare pricing plans and use a plan CTA
description: A store manager can review the pricing plans, recognize the highlighted Pro plan, and continue to trial signup from a plan call to action.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to the pricing section
Verify the pricing plan comparison is displayed
Verify the Pro plan is highlighted as most popular
Click a pricing plan call to action
Verify the trial registration form is displayed

title: Reject an invalid email in the trial form
description: A user entering an invalid email format sees an email validation error and cannot submit the trial request.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to the trial registration section
Fill in the store name field with Sequndang Mart
Fill in the owner name field with Budi Santoso
Fill in the email field with invalid-email
Fill in the WhatsApp number field with a valid phone number
Select a business type
Fill in the city or regency field with Bandung
Submit the trial registration form
Verify an email validation error is visible
Verify a success confirmation is not visible

title: See email format validation on trial signup
description: A visitor can enter an invalid email address in the trial form and see email validation before submission succeeds.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the navigation bar trial call to action
Fill in the required name field with a valid full name
Fill in the required business field with a valid store name
Fill in the required email field with an invalid email address
Fill in the required phone field with a valid phone number
Fill in the required address field with a valid address
Submit the trial registration form
Verify email validation errors are visible

title: Compare pricing plans and identify the popular option
description: A visitor can review the pricing plans and see that the Pro plan is highlighted as the popular choice.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to the pricing section
Verify pricing plan cards are visible
Verify the Pro plan is marked as the popular option

title: Jump from the hero to the features section
description: A visitor can use the secondary hero call to action to reach the features section and continue evaluating the product.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the secondary features call to action
Verify the features section is displayed

title: Open the features section from the homepage navigation
description: A visitor can jump to the features section from the homepage and view the main POS capability cards.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the navigation link for the features section
Verify the features section is displayed
Verify feature cards are visible

title: View the pricing comparison and Pro badge
description: A visitor can review the pricing plans and confirm the Pro plan is highlighted as the most popular option.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to the pricing section
Verify the pricing plans are visible
Verify the Pro plan is highlighted as the most popular option

title: Review the how-it-works walkthrough
description: A visitor can scroll to the how-it-works section and see the numbered onboarding steps that explain the product flow.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to the how-it-works section
Verify the how-it-works section is displayed
Verify the numbered setup steps are visible

title: See the headline and product value in the hero
description: A visitor can view the opening messaging and understand the product value proposition from the hero section.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Verify the hero headline is displayed
Verify the hero subheadline is displayed

title: Review trust indicators in social proof
description: A prospective buyer can see usage statistics or other credibility indicators that support evaluating the product.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to the social proof section
Verify trust indicators are displayed
Verify usage statistics are displayed

title: Open and close FAQ answers
description: A visitor can expand an FAQ question to read its answer and collapse it again before continuing evaluation.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to the FAQ section
Expand an FAQ question
Verify the answer for the selected question is visible
Collapse the same FAQ question
Verify the answer for the selected question is hidden

title: Use the mobile menu to navigate the page
description: A mobile visitor can open the hamburger menu, jump to a section, and continue using the sticky navigation experience.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Open the mobile navigation menu
Click the navigation link for the pricing section
Verify the pricing section is displayed
Verify the mobile navigation menu can be closed

title: Open the mobile navigation and reach a section
description: On a small viewport, a visitor can open the mobile menu and use it to navigate to a page section.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Resize the viewport to a mobile size
Open the hamburger menu
Click the link to the features section
Verify the features section is visible
Verify the mobile navigation is no longer blocking the page

title: Expand and collapse an FAQ answer
description: A visitor can open an FAQ item to get an answer and close it again while comparing the product.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to the FAQ section
Expand an FAQ item
Verify an FAQ answer is displayed
Collapse the same FAQ item
Verify the FAQ answer is hidden

title: Use FAQ to open and close an answer
description: A visitor can expand a FAQ item to read the answer and then collapse it again to keep scanning the page.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to the FAQ section
Expand a FAQ item
Verify the selected FAQ answer is visible
Collapse the same FAQ item
Verify the FAQ answer is hidden

title: Open the page and use the footer navigation to reach a section
description: This verifies that a visitor can use the footer navigation to move to an in-page section and continue browsing the landing page.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to the footer
Click a footer navigation link
Verify the page moves to the linked section

title: Open and close the mobile navigation menu
description: A mobile visitor can open the hamburger menu, view the navigation links, and close the menu again.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Open the mobile navigation menu
Verify the mobile navigation links are displayed
Close the mobile navigation menu
Verify the mobile navigation links are hidden

title: Use contact links for support
description: A visitor can open the support email and WhatsApp contact links from the contact section.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to the contact section
Click the email contact link
Click the WhatsApp contact link
Verify the support contact links are available
Verify the contact section remains visible

title: Use support links from the contact section
description: A visitor looking for help can open the contact section and access support via email or WhatsApp links.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to the contact section
Verify contact support links are displayed
Click the email support link
Verify the email link is available for contact

title: Reach support through contact links
description: A visitor can use the contact section to open support options for email and WhatsApp.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to the contact section
Click the email support link
Click the WhatsApp support link
Verify support contact options are available
Verify the contact section remains accessible

title: Open footer links for product and legal information
description: A visitor can use the footer to access product and legal navigation destinations from the landing page.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to the footer
Click a footer navigation link
Verify the linked destination content is displayed
Verify footer navigation remains available

title: Reject an overlong trial message
description: A user entering a message that exceeds the allowed length sees a length validation error and cannot submit.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to the trial registration section
Fill in the store name field with Sequndang Mart
Fill in the owner name field with Budi Santoso
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the WhatsApp number field with a valid phone number
Select a business type
Fill in the city or regency field with Bandung
Fill in the additional message field with an overlong message
Submit the trial registration form
Verify a message length validation error is visible
Verify a success confirmation is not visible

title: Open a social profile from the footer
description: This verifies that a visitor can open a social media profile from the footer to learn more about the product outside the landing page.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to the footer
Click a social media link
Verify the corresponding social profile opens

title: Show validation errors when trial registration is submitted empty
description: A visitor submitting the trial form without required details sees validation errors and cannot complete registration.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the hero call to action for starting a free trial
Submit the trial registration form without entering details
Verify required field validation errors are visible
Verify the trial registration is not submitted

title: Use footer navigation and review the copyright year
description: A visitor can use the footer for additional site navigation and confirm the current copyright year is shown.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to the footer
Verify footer navigation links are displayed
Verify the copyright year is displayed

title: View the footer copyright information
description: This verifies that a visitor can find the footer copyright notice and year for basic site trust and ownership information.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll to the footer
Verify a copyright notice is visible
Verify the current year is visible
